---
title: "Tools"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.page-shell}
<div class="eyebrow">Tools</div>

# Decision-support and economic-evaluation tools

Interactive applications developed to translate empirical research into transparent, usable analysis.
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.page-shell}
::: {.grid-2}
::: {.tool-card}
<div class="tool-kicker">Vaccine mandates and policy design</div>

### eMANDEVA Decision Aid

The eMANDEVA Decision Aid combines discrete-choice evidence with policy scenarios to assess expected public support, lives saved, benefit–cost outcomes and design trade-offs for prospective vaccine mandates.

<a class="tool-link" data-open-new="true" href="https://mesfingenie.com/eMANDEVA-DecisionAid-V18/">Launch eMANDEVA <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a>
:::

::: {.tool-card}
<div class="tool-kicker">Farm trials and soil management</div>

### Farming BCA Tool

The Farming BCA Tool estimates net present value, benefit–cost ratio, gross profit margin and return on investment for farm practices, with configurable discounting and sensitivity analysis.

<a class="tool-link" data-open-new="true" href="https://mesfingenie.com/farming-bca-tool-v18/">Launch Farming BCA Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a>
:::
:::
:::
:::
